top3.sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN atom a1 ON b.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON b.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND a1.element = 'C'
  AND a2.element = 'C'
  AND a1.atom_id != a2.atom_id
  AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element IN ('As', 'Cd', 'Cr', 'Hg', 'Ni', 'Pb', 'Se', 'Sb', 'Te')
     ...

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND a1.element = 'C'
  AND a2.element = 'C'
  AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element IN ('As', 'Cd', 'Cr', 'Hg', 'Ni', 'Pb', 'Se', 'Sb', 'Te')
       OR...

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN atom a1 ON b.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON b.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND a1.element = 'C'
  AND a2.element = 'C'
  AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogen%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
LIMIT 2;

final.sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN atom a1 ON b.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON b.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
  AND a1.element = 'C'
  AND a2.element = 'C'
  AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogen%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
LIMIT 2;
